data.name: Furry Feet
data.detailed_description:
The game

Furry Feet is a puzzle game, each level comes with an increase in the challenge. 2 Unique exclusive puzzle formulas await you, every level got unique hand drawn artwork!!

Features

- Enjoy 14 levels with unique puzzle formulas and art.

- Completing levels unlock new gallery art, revealing our pretty girls with cute paws.

- Unlock achievements.

data.short_description: Furry Feet...Or Paws if you prefer. Does anything else have to be said?
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文, 法文, 德文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
